sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Penal Code (Amendment) Act, Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Penal Code (Amendment) Act, Short title
2012, and shall be read as one with the Penal Code Act, in this Act Cap. 87
referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section ninety- Repeal and
sections.text:
2. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section ninety- Repeal and
nine and the substitution therefor of the following: replacement
of section 99

sections.heading: A prosecution for an offence under sections ninety- Consent of
sections.text:
99. A prosecution for an offence under sections ninety- Consent of
seven or ninety-eight shall not be instituted except by, or Director of
Public
with, the sanction of the Director of Public Prosecutions. Prosecutions
